final_files.tests/test_workspace_override_final.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def database():
    connection = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    for name in ("notification_config.sql", "notification_resolution.sql"):
        connection.executescript((ROOT / "sql" / name).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    connection.execute("INSERT INTO system_channel VALUES ('push', 1)")
    connection.execute("INSERT INTO workspace VALUES (20, 'Field Team')")
    connection.execute("INSERT INTO member VALUES (20, 3, 'Bea')")
    return connection


def resolved(db):
    return db.execute("SELECT enabled FROM resolved_member_channel WHERE workspace_id = 20 AND member_id = 3 AND channel = 'push'").fetchone()[0]


def test_explicit_workspace_disable_wins_when_member_has_no_row():
    db = database()
    db.execute("INSERT INTO workspace_channel_override VALUES (20, 'push', 0)")
    assert resolved(db) == 0


def test_null_workspace_override_is_retained_and_inherits_system_default():
    db = database()
    db.execute("INSERT INTO workspace_channel_override VALUES (20, 'push', NULL)")
    assert db.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workspace_channel_override").fetchone()[0] == 1
    assert resolved(db) == 1
